rankings.reason: Best narrative flow and captures the futuristic, seamless, and high-tech vision requested for the 2050 Tokyo airport.
Strong focus on biometric integration and AI, though it lacks the immersive storytelling quality of Option A.
Provides good slogans but describes current-day improvements rather than a truly futuristic, innovative 2050 experience.
Worst option as it describes standard, outdated airport procedures rather than a futuristic or innovative experience.
